config.savethehotbar.setting.item_keepin:
What conditions have to be met for an item to be kept after death:
- AND -> Item needs to be in saved slot AND of saved category to be kept after death
- OR -> Item needs to be in saved slot OR of saved category to be kept after death
config.savethehotbar.category.slot_contr: Which slots should be kept after death
config.savethehotbar.setting.save_hotbar: Keep the all the hotbar items after death
config.savethehotbar.setting.save_armour: Keep the all the armor pieces after death
config.savethehotbar.setting.save_second: Keep the second hand item after death
config.savethehotbar.setting.save_main_i: Keep the main inventory after death
config.savethehotbar.category.modded_slo: Which modded slots should be kept
config.savethehotbar.setting.save_arsena: Keep Arsenal's back slot after death
config.savethehotbar.category.item_type_: Which item types should be kept after death
config.savethehotbar.setting.item_catego:
Weather the item should be kept when all of it's categories are kept or at least one of them
- LENIENT -> Item has to be of at least one of the kept item types
- STRICT -> All of item's item types have to be kept
config.savethehotbar.setting.keep_equipm:
Keep equipment after death
Equipment is anything you can wear
config.savethehotbar.setting.keep_light_: Keep items that when placed emmit light after death
config.savethehotbar.setting.keep_possib: Keep items that when placed can emmit light under certain conditions after death
Keep other item types from the ones above after death
config.savethehotbar.category.exp_contro: What should happen to player experience after death
config.savethehotbar.setting.experience_:
Determines what will happen to the player's experience after death.
- DROP -> Experience will drop in the place of death
- STORE -> Expereince will be kept safe in the grave (requires 'Contain Drop' to be enabled)
- KEEP -> Experience is kept after death
The amount of experience, either dropped, stored or kept, is determined by Experience Calculation Mode

Determines the amount of EXP that will be dropped, stored or kept after death.=
- ALL -> The experience stays unchanged
- FRACTION -> The experience is multiplied by Experience Fraction
- VANILLA -> New experience will be equal to '{player_level} * 7'
The modes are sorted from the most to the least forgiving
The fraction of experience that should be dropped/stored/kept after death
config.savethehotbar.category.random_dro: Random chance for an otherwise kept item to not be kept on death
config.savethehotbar.setting.random_drop: The chance for a normally kept item to be randomly dropped/stored (0.0 -> 0%; 1.0 -> 100%)
config.savethehotbar.setting.rarity_drop:
A percentage by which the random drop chance will be decreased
(e.g. rdc = 20%, rdcd = 20%, UNCOMMON item will have 16% change to drop)
config.savethehotbar.setting.luck_drop_c:
A percentage by which the random drop chance will be decreased
(e.g. rdc = 20%, ldcd = 20%, with luck 1, item will have 16% change to drop)
config.savethehotbar.category.drop_contr: What should happen to the non-kept items after death
config.savethehotbar.setting.random_item:
If 'False', all the items will drop in the exact position of your death and will not spread outwards.
If `True`, all the dropped items will be spread randomly in all directions like in vanilla
config.savethehotbar.setting.contain_dro:
If `False`, all non-kept items will be dropped after death.
If `True`, all non-kept will be stored in a block specified by the 'Contain Drop Mode' option

Changes the block in which non-kept items will be stored after death if `Contain Drop` is `True`.
- 'SACK'
  After player death, a sack will be spawned, containing all the non-kept items.
  Drops items on destruction. Can be waterlogged. Does not drop itself.
- 'SKELETON_HEAD' / 'ZOMBIE_HEAD' / 'RANDOM_HEAD'
  After player death, a 'mob head grave' will be spawned, containing all the non-kept items.
  Drops items on destruction. Does not drop itself.
  The Grave will be spawned in the first found valid spawn location, which is a full block with replaceable block on top.
  If such location inside 'mobGraveMaxSpawnRadius' radius isn't found, a 'SACK' grave will be spawned instead.
- 'GRAVE'
  GRAVESTONES https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumono_gravestones MOD REQUIRED!!!
  After player death, a grave from the `Gravestones` mod will be spawned, containing the non-kept items and XP according to its configuration.
config.savethehotbar.category.grave_spaw: Spawning logic of the grave containers
config.savethehotbar.setting.sack_max_sp: The maximum search radius for a valid sack spawning position. If no valid place is found, a Sack will be spawned directly at the death position replacing whatever block was there.
config.savethehotbar.setting.mob_head_gr: Mob Head Grave Max Spawn Radius
The maximum search radius for a valid mob grave spawning position. If no valid place will be found, a Sack will be spawned instead
config.savethehotbar.setting.allow_mob_h: Allow Mob Head Graves To Spawn On Slabs
If `True`, a top slab block will also be considered a valid grave spawning block
config.savethehotbar.setting.log_death_c: If 'True', the death coordinates will be sent in chat upon player death
config.savethehotbar.setting.log_grave_c: If 'True', the grave spawn coordinates will be sent in chat upon player death
